# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'AWS CloudFormation Template: VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer'
Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
  MySubnet:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
  MySecurityGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup'
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: My security group
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Instance'
    Properties:
      ImageId: 'ami-0abcdef1234567890'
      InstanceType: 't2.micro'
      KeyName: 'my-key-pair'
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - AssociatePublicIpAddress: 'true'
          DeviceIndex: '0'
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref MySecurityGroup
          SubnetId: !Ref MySubnet
  MyDBInstance:
    Type: 'AWS::RDS::DBInstance'
    Properties:
      AllocatedStorage: '5'
      DBInstanceClass: 'db.t2.micro'
      Engine: 'MySQL'
      MasterUsername: 'admin'
      MasterUserPassword: 'password'
  MyBucket:
    Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
    Properties:
      BucketName: 'my-s3-bucket'
  MyLoadBalancer:
    Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancing::LoadBalancer'
    Properties:
      Subnets:
        - !Ref MySubnet
      Listeners:
        - LoadBalancerPort: '80'
          InstancePort: '80'
          Protocol: 'HTTP'
  MyLoadBalancerSecurityGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup'
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security Group for ELB
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
